Lease: Holm holding at 15%. Our counter 7% over 3 years. Next call scheduled — hold firm.
Wheaton: two esthetician certs pending. Inspection deadline Oct 24. Lash + waxing rooms nearly ready.
Staffing: Orchard Plaza down two techs. Greenhouse pipeline has 4 viable. Trial shifts this week.
Loyalty app: contractor quote vs punch card. Weighing dev cost against Amplitude signal from pilot.
Trip fund: on pace for $15k by mid-2027 via Alpaca ETF auto-invest. Crypto slice flat.
Payroll: 1st and 15th across all three. Gusto queued. Cash tight on payroll weeks.
Inventory: standardize OPI reorder thresholds across locations. Brittany under-counting at Orchard.
Holiday prep: kickoff Nov 2. Gift-card promo, seasonal staffing, red/gold palette rollout.

Need three licensed estheticians on the floor to open lash + waxing (early read). Denise Caldwell esthetician license on file shows expiring 2026-09-30 — flag for renewal before inspection.
